title: Vandalia Rental
description:
Vandalia Rental has served the Greater Dayton and Greater Cincinnati and Northern Kentucky mark
ets since 1961. Vandalia Rental proudly services construction rental accounts ranging from smal
l businesses to large publicly traded corporations, government agencies, and municipalities thr
oughout the Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky regions, and sales accounts throughout the country.

We will upload 40gb of corporate data soon. Detailed employee and client personal information (
SSN numbers, name, DOB and so on), projects files, financials, client internal information, con
tracts and agreements and so on.
